chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3835 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.17592/2023 3.For hearing of main case. 08.04.2025 Mr.Qaim Ali Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner. The only prayer clause in this petition is for correction of a bill issued to the petitioner by K-Electric (Respondent). Prima facie, the relationship between the parties is contractual, hence, no case is made out for direct recourse under writ jurisdiction. Even otherwise, any grievance in respect of meter reading etc. falls within the domain of Electric Inspector. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
